positive: A centered, highly detailed, minimalist illustration of a celestial woodland scene. The main subject features two stylized mythological creatures (a fox and an owl) intertwined amongst glowing nebula flora and stylized crescent moons. The style must be clean graphic novel art mixed with elegant celestial linework, featuring strong, crisp silhouettes and high contrast black lines against a limited palette of deep indigo, ethereal turquoise, and glowing pale gold accents. The composition must be perfectly symmetrical or radially balanced, suitable for direct print application on apparel, avoiding gradients and excessive photorealism. Highly detailed, stylized vector illustration, symmetrical composition.
